summary: Soundboard recording with early hissy/compressed moments but overall good quality, delivering an excellent mid‑70s show highlighted by Rain & Snow, Crazy Fingers, Cassidy and Ship of Fools.
review: Fans rave about the musical performance – the set is packed with standout jams like Rain & Snow, Crazy Fingers, Cassidy, Ship of Fools and a rocking Promised Land. The soundboard source suffers from a muffled, hiss‑filled first half, but clears up after the early tracks, showcasing Phil’s bass and the piano nicely balanced.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive comments on musical performance outweigh moderate complaints about early‑set audio quality; five detailed reviews give a consistent picture.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Early portion described as hissy, compressed and muffled; board comes in clearer around 2:40 of Rain & Snow, with praised bass clarity and piano level.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set opens with solid jam tunes but suffers from sound drop‑off early on; once the board engages the performance shines, maintaining strong energy through the remainder of the set and closing with a rock‑filled Promised Land.

band_member_comments.Phil: His bass is highlighted as clear and well‑balanced in the mix.
band_member_comments.Keys: Piano/keyboard levels are noted as nicely balanced and audible.
